name: Activity Table - Gigglescape™: Music & Multiple Activities, Wood & Metal, Ages 2+, Creative Thinking, Fine Motor Skills
description:
Keep your little one active and engaged with the Activity Table from Gigglescape™. Made from wood and metal, this activity set includes seven pieces that form a bead maze, xylophone, animal cars and more. These parts sit on top of a 25-inch-tall table to create a surface they can easily reach while sitting or kneeling on the floor. Designed with a wide variety of activities, this table set will help them develop fine motor and problem solving skills.

Gigglescape™: Where play starts and discovery never ends.
